nonBlockingIssues.description: The validateIssueStatusTransition function and its types are exported from issue.ts but NOT re-exported from validators/index.ts. This means consumers must import directly from 'validators/issue.js' rather than the package root. Adding re-exports to validators/index.ts would improve API discoverability.

summary: All validation contract assertions are fulfilled. The validateIssueStatusTransition helper is correctly implemented in packages/shared/src/validators/issue.ts with comprehensive test coverage (19 tests in issue.test.ts). All tests pass, typecheck passes for the shared package. The vitest.config.ts properly includes the shared package in the test workspace. One non-blocking API discoverability suggestion noted.
